Published: May 3, 2026 | Last reviewed: May 3, 2026

Dengue Bukhar Ki Alamat — Symptoms, Treatment aur Bachao Pakistan

TL;DR — Key Takeaways
  • Dengue Aedes mosquito se transmitted virus
  • Pakistan mein peak season August-November
  • Classic symptoms: shadeed bukhar, sir dard, joint pain
  • Sirf Panadol — Brufen aur Aspirin BILKUL nahi
  • Platelet 100,000 se kam = hospital

Dengue Kya Hai?

Dengue ek viral infection hai jo Aedes aegypti aur Aedes albopictus macharon ke kaatne se phailta hai. Pakistan mein August-November mein peak hota hai — barsat ke baad jab macharon ki breeding zyada hoti hai.

Pakistan Mein Dengue — Facts
Peak seasonAugust-November (post-monsoon)
High-risk citiesKarachi, Lahore, Rawalpindi, Faisalabad
Annual cases10,000-50,000+ depending on year
Mortality (without treatment)1-5%, with proper care < 1%
Re-infectionDifferent strain se re-infection possible aur worse

Dengue Mosquito Ki Pehchan

  • Aedes aegypti: Black with white stripes
  • Day-time biters (subah aur shaam peak)
  • Indoor breeding — clean stagnant water (flower vases, water tanks, AC trays)
  • Urban environments mein zyada

Dengue Ki Classic Alamat (Symptoms)

Phase 1 — Febrile Phase (Pehlay 2-7 Din):

  • Achanak shadeed bukhar 102-105°F
  • Bohat shadeed sir dard (especially ankhon ke peeche)
  • Joron aur muscles mein shadeed dard ("breakbone fever")
  • Hadiyon mein dard
  • Ulti, mitli
  • Bhook na lagna
  • Skin par red rash (kuch cases mein)
  • Eyes lal hona
  • Glands sojayi

Phase 2 — Critical Phase (Day 3-7):

Bukhar utar ne ke baad kuch cases mein critical phase shuru hoti hai jo serious ho sakti:

  • Pet dard
  • Persistent vomiting
  • Naak/masooro se bleeding
  • Skin pe nile chakatte (bruising)
  • Stool mein khoon
  • Sustpan, restlessness
  • Cold/clammy skin
  • Sans phoolna

Yeh Dengue Hemorrhagic Fever ya Dengue Shock Syndrome ki nishani hai — emergency.

Phase 3 — Recovery (Day 7-10):

  • Symptoms gradually theek hote
  • Energy slowly wapas
  • Skin par recovery rash possible
  • Thakawat hafton tak rah sakti

Diagnosis

Tests:

  • NS1 antigen: Pehlay 5 din effective
  • IgM/IgG antibodies: Day 5+ accurate
  • CBC (Complete Blood Count): Platelet count critical
  • Hematocrit: Plasma leakage detect karne ke liye

Platelet Count Importance:

Platelet CountAction
150,000-450,000Normal
100,000-150,000Monitor closely, daily CBC
50,000-100,000Hospital admission consider
20,000-50,000Hospital — bleeding risk
Below 20,000Critical — platelet transfusion

Dengue Ka Ilaj

No Specific Cure — Supportive Care:

Dengue ka koi specific antiviral nahi. Treatment focuses on:

  • Bukhar control
  • Hydration
  • Pain relief
  • Monitoring
  • Complications ka management

Sirf Panadol!

EXTREMELY IMPORTANT: Dengue mein sirf Paracetamol (Panadol) use karein.

BILKUL AVOID:

  • Brufen (ibuprofen) — bleeding risk barhata
  • Aspirin (Disprin) — bleeding risk barhata, Reye's syndrome
  • Diclofenac (Voltral) — kidney damage
  • Ponstan — NSAID
  • Arinac Forte — contains ibuprofen
  • Mefenamic acid

Panadol Dose: 500-1000 mg har 6 ghante baad, max 4 grams (4g) per day.

Hydration Critical:

  • Bohat zyada paani
  • ORS
  • Coconut water
  • Fruit juices
  • Yakhni (chicken broth)
  • Day mein 2-3 liter fluids

Foods to Eat:

  • Papita (papaya leaf juice traditional, magar evidence limited)
  • Anar
  • Kiwi
  • Citrus fruits (vitamin C)
  • Soft easy-to-digest foods
  • Khichri

Rest:

Complete bed rest 7-10 din. Phir gradual activity.

Dengue ka shubha hai? Ilaaj AI pe doctor se mashwara — lab tests guidance aur monitoring plan, ghar baithe.

Doctor Se Foran Mashwara

Hospital Kab Jaein? — Warning Signs

Foran ER:

  • Severe pet dard
  • Persistent vomiting (3+ baar)
  • Naak/masooro se bleeding
  • Stool mein khoon ya kaali stool
  • Skin pe nile/red dhabbe
  • Sustpan ya restlessness
  • Cold/clammy hands and feet
  • Sans phoolna
  • Behoshi
  • Pesab kam ya band
  • Platelet count 50,000 se kam
  • Pregnant women — kisi bhi bukhar mein
  • Bachay (1 saal se kam) ya buzurg (65+) higher risk

Dengue Se Bachao

Mosquito Bite Prevention:

  • Mosquito repellent: DEET-based (Odomos, Off!)
  • Long sleeves aur long pants
  • Mosquito coils ya electric repellents
  • Window screens
  • Bed nets — especially bachay aur buzurg
  • AC use karein — mosquitos cool air avoid karte
  • Avoid dawn aur dusk outdoor (peak biting time)

Eliminate Breeding Sites:

  • Stagnant water khatm karein:
    • Flower vases (weekly change)
    • AC trays
    • Roof tanks (cover karein)
    • Old tires
    • Garden buckets
    • Bird baths
  • Drain blockages clear
  • Construction sites mein water collection nahi
  • Cemeteries (flower water containers)

Community Action:

  • Mohalla cleanup drives
  • Government fogging support
  • Awareness camps
  • Schools mein education

Re-infection Aur Severe Dengue

Dengue ke 4 different strains (DENV 1-4) hain. Ek strain ke baad usi se permanent immunity, magar:

  • Different strain se re-infection aksar hoti hai
  • Second infection often more severe (Antibody-Dependent Enhancement)
  • Pakistan mein sab 4 strains circulate karte hain
  • Isliye history hai to extra cautious

Vaccine

Dengvaxia vaccine available hai magar Pakistan mein routine use nahi:

  • Sirf 9-45 saal ke logon ke liye
  • Pichla dengue infection confirmed ho to safe
  • Naive individuals mein severe dengue ka risk badha sakti
  • WHO conditional recommendation

Dengue Vs Other Bukhar

FeatureDengueTyphoidMalariaViral Flu
OnsetAchanakSlowPeriodicSlow
Bukhar102-105°FStep-ladderSpike + chills99-102°F
Joint painShadeedMildMildMild
Eye painBehind eyesNoNoNo
RashYes (50%)Rose spotsNoNo
Bleeding riskYESNoNoNo
TreatmentSupportive onlyAntibioticsAnti-malarialsSupportive

Pregnant Women Mein Dengue

  • Higher risk of severe dengue
  • Bleeding complications during delivery
  • Pre-term labor risk
  • Vertical transmission to baby possible
  • Hospital admission almost always
  • Sirf Paracetamol use karein

Conclusion

Dengue Pakistan ka seasonal public health crisis hai jo har saal hazaron logon ko affect karta hai. Sirf Panadol use karein, hydration zyada, platelet count regular monitor karein. Warning signs (pet dard, ulti, bleeding) pe foran hospital. Prevention sab se important — mosquito bites avoid karein aur breeding sites khatm karein. Ilaaj AI pe doctor consultation aur lab test guidance, ghar baithe.

Frequently Asked Questions

Dengue ki shuru ki alamat kya hain?

Dengue ke pehlay 24-48 ghante mein: achanak shadeed bukhar 102-105°F, bohat shadeed sir dard (especially ankhon ke peeche), joron aur muscles mein shadeed dard ("breakbone fever"), ulti, mitli, bhook na lagna. Skin par red rash (50% cases). Pakistan mein August-November mein high suspicion. Symptoms ke 24-48 ghante mein doctor consultation aur NS1 antigen test.

Dengue mein kya khaana chahiye?

Hydration sab se important — bohat paani, ORS, coconut water, fruit juices, yakhni (chicken broth). Soft easy-to-digest foods: khichri, dahi, supe. Vitamin C rich fruits: anar, kiwi, citrus. Papita aur uske patte traditional remedy hain (evidence limited magar safe). Day mein 2-3 liter fluids. Spicy aur fried foods avoid karein. Sirf Panadol — Brufen, Aspirin, Voltral BILKUL avoid.

Dengue mein platelet count kab khatre ki nishani hai?

Normal platelet count 150,000-450,000. Dengue mein: 100,000-150,000 = monitor karein (daily CBC). 50,000-100,000 = hospital admission consider. 20,000-50,000 = hospital, bleeding risk. 20,000 se kam = critical, platelet transfusion zaruri. Magar count alone nahi — clinical signs (bleeding, pet dard, ulti) bhi consider hote hain. Pet dard, persistent vomiting, ya bleeding ke saath hospital foran.

Dengue se bachne ke liye kya karein?

Mosquito bite prevention: DEET-based repellent (Odomos), long sleeves/pants, bed nets, mosquito coils, AC use karein. Breeding sites khatm karein: stagnant water (flower vases, AC trays, water tanks, old tires). Aedes mosquitos day-time biters hain (especially dawn aur dusk). Pakistan mein August-November peak season mein extra cautious. Mohalla cleanup drives mein hissa lein.

Dengue mein hospital kab jaana chahiye?

Foran hospital ER agar: severe pet dard, persistent vomiting (3+ baar), naak/masooro se bleeding, stool mein khoon, skin par nile/red dhabbe, sustpan, cold clammy skin, sans phoolna, behoshi, pesab kam ya band, platelet count 50,000 se kam. Pregnant women, bachay (1 saal se kam), aur buzurg (65+) mein kisi bhi dengue suspicion mein hospital. Yeh Dengue Hemorrhagic Fever ya Shock Syndrome ki warnings hain.
